a_req: org shall consult with the reviewers named in the Impact Assessment.
b_req: org shall document that plan.

a_req: org shall document the prioritized identified demographic groups using the Impact Assessment template.
b_req: org shall collect data to close any gaps in inclusiveness of the identified demographic groups.

a_req: org shall review the completed Impact Assessment with the reviewers identified according to your organization's compliance process before development starts.
b_req: org shall secure all required approvals from those reviewers.

a_req: developer shall design the system so that stakeholders identified in requirement T1.1 can understand the system's intended uses.
b_req: developer shall document how the system design will support those two categories of stakeholders' understanding of the system's intended uses, how it aids their ability to interpret relevant system responses, and how the system design discourages automation bias.

a_req: developer must document the failure management approach for each case of a predictable failure likely to have an adverse impact on a stakeholder.
b_req: developer must estimate the time range for resolving predictable failures for each designed solution, or indicate that the failure will be prevented by design.

a_req: org must document which events will be monitored.
b_req: org must document how events will be prioritized for response and timing to resolution.

a_req: Developer shall design AI systems that describe, depict, or otherwise represent people, cultures, or society to minimize the potential for stereotyping, demeaning, or erasing identified demographic groups, including marginalized groups.
b_req: Developer shall include groups defined by a combination of factors when identifying and prioritizing demographic groups at risk of stereotyping, demeaning, or erasing outputs.

a_req: org shall review the completed Impact Assessment with the reviewers identified according to your organization's compliance process before development starts.
b_req: org shall review the Impact Assessment.

a_req: org must include in the published documentation for stakeholders defined in T2.1 limitations, including uses for which the system was not designed or evaluated.
b_req: org must publish documentation for the system so that stakeholders defined in T2.1 can understand the system.

a_req: Org shall report the system to the Office of Responsible AI when the system meets the definition of a Sensitive Use.
b_req: Org shall answer prompts in the Impact Assessment template to determine whether the system meets the definition of a Sensitive Use.

a_req: org must establish and document a detailed inventory of the system health monitoring methods to be used.
b_req: org must define and document a standard operating procedure and a system health monitoring action plan for each monitoring channel for the system.

a_req: developer shall assess the quantity and suitability of available data sets needed by the system in relation to the data requirements defined in A4.1.
b_req: developer shall document the assessment in the Impact Assessment.

a_req: org must document processes for reproducing system failures to support troubleshooting and prevention of future failures.
b_req: org must document how events will be prioritized for review.

a_req: developer shall identify the system elements (including system UX, features, alerting and reporting functions, and educational materials) necessary for stakeholders identified in requirement A5.1 to effectively understand their oversight responsibilities and carry them out.
b_req: developer shall document the system design elements that will enable relevant stakeholders to understand the system's intended uses.

a_req: Org shall report the system to the Office of Responsible AI when the system meets the definition of a Sensitive Use.
b_req: The org shall notify the Office of Responsible AI about systems that meet the criteria for Restricted Uses.

a_req: developer shall define and document the evaluation to be performed to support this Goal.
b_req: developer shall document the metrics to be used to evaluate the system components and the whole system.

a_req: org shall define and document Responsible Release Criteria for this Goal.
b_req: Decide how to proceed when the required Responsible Release Criteria cannot be met.

a_req: org must take action to close the identified gap or discontinue the system.
b_req: org shall revise documentation related to the intended use and publish the revised documentation to customers.

a_req: org shall document the prioritized identified demographic groups using the Impact Assessment template.
b_req: org shall define and document a plan to evaluate the system components and the whole system for risks of erasing the prioritized identified demographic groups.

a_req: org shall identify the stakeholders who are responsible for troubleshooting, managing, operating, overseeing, and controlling the system during and after deployment.
b_req: org shall identify stakeholders who develop or deploy systems that integrate with this system.

a_req: org shall consult with the reviewers named in the Impact Assessment.
b_req: Review the results when the required Responsible Release Criteria cannot be met.

a_req: org must include in the published documentation for stakeholders defined in T2.1 evidence of system accuracy and performance and a description of the extent to which these results are generalizable across use cases that were not part of the evaluation.
b_req: org must include in the published documentation for stakeholders defined in T2.1 limitations, including uses for which the system was not designed or evaluated.

a_req: org must document the identified stakeholders using the Impact Assessment template.
b_req: The org must identify stakeholders who will use or be exposed to the system in accordance with the Impact Assessment requirements.

a_req: org shall complete an Impact Assessment that assesses the system's impact on people, organizations, and society.
b_req: org shall review defined Restricted Uses to determine whether the system meets the definition of any Restricted Use.

a_req: The org must document a plan for managing previously unknown failures that come to light once the system is in use.
b_req: The org must, as part of that plan, describe the system's rollback plan and document the time that may elapse until the entire system across all endpoints can be rolled back.

a_req: developer shall define data requirements with respect to the system's intended uses, stakeholders, and the geographic areas where the system will be deployed.
b_req: developer shall define methods for evaluating data to be used by the system against the requirements defined in A4.1.

a_req: The org must, as part of that plan, describe the process for updating and releasing updates to each model and document the time that may elapse until the system has been updated across all endpoints.
b_req: The org must, as part of that plan, describe how customers, partners, and end users will be notified of changes to the system, updated understandings of failures, and their best mitigations.

a_req: developer shall determine and document how often ongoing evaluation should be conducted to continue supporting this Goal.
b_req: Conduct all evaluations that are tagged as Ongoing Evaluation Checkpoints in other Goals on an ongoing basis.

a_req: org shall evaluate all data sets to assess inclusiveness of identified demographic groups.
b_req: org shall document the evaluation process and its results.

a_req: developer shall document the system design elements that will enable relevant stakeholders to understand the system's intended uses.
b_req: developer shall document the system design elements that will enable relevant stakeholders to remain aware of the possible tendency to over-rely on outputs produced by the system ("automation bias").

a_req: org shall complete an Impact Assessment that assesses the system's impact on people, organizations, and society.
b_req: org shall use the Impact Assessment template to document any adverse impacts of these predictable failures on stakeholders.

a_req: developer shall use the methods defined in requirement A3.4 to conduct evaluations.
b_req: developer shall conduct the evaluations defined by requirement T1.3.

a_req: Developer shall identify and prioritize demographic groups, including marginalized groups, that may be at risk of experiencing worse quality of service.
b_req: developer shall include groups defined by a single factor among the identified and prioritized demographic groups.

a_req: Developer shall design AI systems that describe, depict, or otherwise represent people, cultures, or society to minimize the potential for stereotyping, demeaning, or erasing identified demographic groups, including marginalized groups.
b_req: Developer shall include groups defined by a single factor when identifying and prioritizing demographic groups at risk of stereotyping, demeaning, or erasing outputs.

a_req: org shall consult with the reviewers named in the Impact Assessment.
b_req: org shall consult with the Office of Responsible AI.

a_req: org must include in that inventory data and insights generated from data repositories, system analytics, and associated alerts.
b_req: org must include in that inventory processes by which customers can submit information about failures and concerns.

a_req: org shall define and document Responsible Release Criteria for this Goal.
b_req: org shall document the plan that details how the gap will be managed until it can be closed.

a_req: org shall evaluate all data sets to assess inclusiveness of identified demographic groups.
b_req: org shall document the prioritized identified demographic groups using the Impact Assessment template.

a_req: org shall include in the Responsible Release Criteria a concise definition of the problem being solved in the intended use.
b_req: org shall document that plan.

a_req: org shall identify the stakeholders who are responsible for troubleshooting, managing, operating, overseeing, and controlling the system during and after deployment.
b_req: org shall document these stakeholders and their oversight and control responsibilities using the Impact Assessment template.

a_req: The org must, as part of that plan, describe the system's rollback plan and document the time that may elapse until the entire system across all endpoints can be rolled back.
b_req: The org must, as part of that plan, describe the process for updating and releasing updates to each model and document the time that may elapse until the system has been updated across all endpoints.
